resources.string: Mushroom season is in full swing! Tap the porcini mushrooms to score points, avoid the death caps (they reset your score to zero), and watch out for the fly agaric mushrooms that blur the screen!

" 🎯 In this game, start by creating the elements: • 1st tap ➜ Target 🎯 • 2nd tap ➜ Ball ⚪ • All following taps ➜ Obstacles 🚧
➡ Once the ball is created, tilt your device to make it roll. 🏁 If it reaches the target, you win! 💥 If it hits an obstacle, the game is lost and restarts automatically. "
A simple free-drawing game: Choose a color, then tap and drag your finger to draw on the screen!
Tap at the top or bottom to help a party advance toward victory. When the two meet, one party wins the Senate!
Take a photo and apply fun filters like inversion, blur, or color change!

"In this game, a city is randomly selected (e.g. Paris), and your current location is detected.
Your goal is to guess the temperature difference between your current location and the chosen city.
• You have 3 attempts. • On the 3rd attempt, you get a hint (either the city or the temperature). • If you guess the correct difference, you win! If not, the answer is revealed and you can play again."

"🌍 A distance game: a city is randomly selected and your current location is detected.

Your mission is to guess the distance (in kilometers) between you and the selected city!

You have 3 attempts per guess.
Good luck!"
Guess the distance between your position and the drawn city!
Guess the temperature difference between your location and a randomly selected city.
